# Models that are team-scoped but still on a non-fail-closed manager.
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. This file is the mechanical output of
# `--regenerate-baseline` — adding entries by hand defeats the algebra and
# turns this back into a hand-curated allowlist (the IDOR-list problem).
#
# Auto-generated by .github/scripts/check-idor-model-coverage.py
# Regenerate with: python .github/scripts/check-idor-model-coverage.py --regenerate-baseline
#
# Adopting fail-closed: change the model's base from RootTeamMixin to
# TeamScopedRootMixin (main DB) or ProductTeamModel (separate DB), then
# audit every call site to either be inside team scope or use .unscoped().
# Once that's done, regenerate this file and the model drops out.
